description_en: Contains information such as the name of the grower, the name of the requester and the quality of the sample.
purpose_en: To maintain a record of all unofficial samples submitted for grading by grain inspectors.
retention_and_disposal_standards_en: To be determined by Library and Archives Canada.

title_en: Producer Railway Car Allocation Files (Class of Record)
description_en: Correspondence and producers car applications contain information such as the producer's name, address, phone number, fax number, email address, application number; type, quality and quantity of grain; and the producer identification number.
purpose_en: This information is used to allocate railcars to grain producers for the transport of their crop to terminal elevators or other destinations as set out in section 87 of the *Canada Grain Act*.
retention_and_disposal_standards_en: To be determined by Library and Archives Canada
